name: Resmo API
description: Resmo is a cloud-native asset visibility and security platform. The Resmo API enables querying your cloud asset inventory, managing integrations, rules, notifications, and audit logs programmatically. Resmo uses SQL-like queries to search across all integrated cloud resources.
